notes: The main tracked tree was dirty, so the release contract was run from a detached clean worktree at HEAD without weakening scripts/release_check.sh.
objective: Run the release contract and close the smallest assemble, verify, inspect, or public-surface gap without adding attestation, proof, secrecy, or RNG claims.
residual_risks: The receipt records the release gate result for HEAD in a detached clean worktree; uncommitted main-tree edits are not release-verified until committed or separately tested.

verification_result: Canonical release gate passed in a detached clean worktree at HEAD.
